overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Redis integration uses the Filebeat Redis module to automatically collect and parse Redis database server logs and slow query logs. Supports multiple Redis deployment modes (standalone, master-slave, cluster, sentinel), helping you monitor Redis running status, identify performance bottlenecks, and track slow commands.

items.title: Server Log Collection
items.description: Collect startup, connection, persistence, replication logs

items.title: Slow Query Analysis
items.description: Identify commands exceeding threshold with execution time

items.title: Master-Slave Monitoring
items.description: Track failovers, sync status, disconnection events

items.title: Persistence Tracking
items.description: Monitor RDB/AOF persistence operation status and duration

fieldTables.description: Redis logs will be parsed into the following structured fields:
